EmailTemplate.name: AES - Onboarding Pack Update Request
EmailTemplate.subject: Please update your documentation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
SOMETHING NEEDS YOUR ATTENTION.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We've had a look at the documentation you've provided and have a couple of comments.
Please head to the Portal and review {!b3o__Document_Assignment__c.b3o__Document_Pack__c}. You will see a red dot next to the document we need you to update.
UPDATE DOCUMENTATION
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
